課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）

name: 施欣文
schedule: Students will continue writing their senior project drafts, keeping in close contact with me and turning in drafts for group peer review on for three specified deadlines before the final draft. They will make their final presentation in January.
scorePolicy: Students are graded based on their effort and their final product. Students with a high grade will turn in drafts on time, communicate with me about their progress, give help peer review feedback to their peers, follow proper citation conventions and refrain from any unpermitted and uncited reliance on AI, and complete a project which shows their effort, critical thinking, and writing and organizational skill. They will engage in a useful conversation with previous scholars writing on related topics. Readers will be fascinated by the student's original ideas and how they are presented.
materials: I share materials with the students when they need them. They may make use of the Seagull Handbook or their Research Methods course packet as well.
consultation: Office hours are on Monday from 10–12 by appointment and on Wednesdays from 1:00–3:00. Students can can also use MS Teams to contact me.
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG5：性別平等（Gender Equality）SDG8：尊嚴就業與經濟發展（Decent Work and Economic Growth）
remarks: The students are already aware of my positions on AI and the necessary for honesty, critical thinking, and citation, but we will discuss the topic as needed.

name: 陳雅玫
objective:
本課程旨在發展學生獨立規劃及從事研究的能力，學生可在指導老師的指導下，依個別的需求選擇研究的方向，訂定題目，並獨立完成研究計畫，撰寫報告。
專題研究範圍含：
實驗研究
量調查研究或質調查研究
個案研究
回溯研究
文化比較研究
理論闡述研究
schedule:
1. Week 1 ~ Week 4 Literature Review
2. Week 5 ~ Week 12 Data Analysis
3. Week 13 ~ Week 15 Introduction and Conclusion
4. Week 16 ~ Week 18 Final Revision and Presentation
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）

name: 黃如瑩
objective:
本課程旨在發展學生獨立規劃及從事研究的能力，學生可在指導老師的指導下，依個別的需求選擇研究的方向，訂定題目，並獨立完成研究計畫，撰寫報告。
專題研究範圍含：實驗研究，量調查研究或質調查研究，個案研究，回溯研究，文化比較研究，理論闡述研究，等。
The purpose of this course is to guide our students to explore their interested field, to look for possible critical approaches, to locate intriguing issues, to map out the various aspects pertaining to the discussions on certain topic, and to work out an outline that will eventually lead to the completion of an MLA-styled academic paper.
schedule:
Unit One: Using research resources
Week 1 Introduction
Week 2 Library Tour
Week 3 Database I
Week 4 Database II
Unit Two: Searching for target field
Week 5 Internet resources
Week 6 Choosing for desired fields
Week 7 Focusing on one field
Week 8 Locating several areas of interest
Unit Three: Choosing a topic
Week 9 Deciding on one area
Week 10 Exploring several possibile issues
Week 11 Narrowing down on two to three issues
Week 12 Doing research on these issues
Unit Four: Choosing a topic
Week 13 Focusing on one topic
Week 14 Discovering various aspects of the issues
Week 15 Doing research on these specific issues
Week 16 Choosing one issue that especially interests you
Wrapping up
Week 17 Research on this specific issue
Week 18 Presentation of the specific title for your thesis
scorePolicy:
1. Participation in meetings: 50%
2. Final project: research outcome  50%
materials:
1. Writing Research Papers:  A Norton Guide. 4th Edition. By Melissa Walker. new York: Norton. 1997.
2. Handbooks on MLA and APA Writing Styles.
